Name: Candidate for US Congress - 13th District
Description:
If we remove the filters of "Democrat versus Republican" thinking, most people agree at least 70% of the time - sometimes more! 

We all want a safe environment in which to raise our families or be with those we love. We care about our health, the economy and our own ability to earn a living. We want to make sure people who can't fully care for themselves are cared for. And most importantly, we believe we are smart enough to care for ourselves and our families if we are given the proper opportunities. 

Democrats, Independents and Republicans have told me the country has been hijacked by career politicians that believe they can dictate what is best for the people.  But normal citizens, many of whom have never watched politics very closely, are starting to wake up to what is happening in Washington DC (and Sacramento), and they want their country back.

I am one of those people that would like to see our country taken back from career politicians.  Maybe I am idealistic, but I truly believe that the government was not designed to give professional politicians a life-long job.  It was designed as a REPRESENTATIVE government where the people have access to their elected officials, can speak their minds and have their views supported at a Federal level. It is time to return to those values.

If you are like me, you are disappointed with the constant battles between Democrats and Republicans.  You are probably tired of the “us versus them” arguments and both parties vying for supremacy so they can pass the bills they support as a party, regardless of what is best for the people they represent.

I would argue that the real “us versus them battle” is the citizens versus the ruling class politicians that think they are above accountability to the people.  That is why I am running for Congress in California’s 13th Congressional District (CA-13).

You can learn more about my Pro-Constituent, Pro-Jobs, Pro-Business platform at www.chrispareja.com.

Name: www.premiewhk.nl
Description:
www.premiewhk.nl is een nieuw initiatief van Merces Custodio,
risico management specialisten van verzuim gerelateerde kosten.

De Belastingdienst stuurt ook dit jaar vanaf begin december elke werkgever de beschikking loonheffingen
gedifferentieerd premiepercentage werkhervattingskas (premie Whk). Op deze beschikking
staan de premies vermeld die de werkgever moet betalen in 2015 voor de volgende risico’s:

• WGA-vast medewerkers
• WGA-flex medewerkers
• Ziektewet-flex medewerkers

De werkgever is 12 jaar verantwoordelijk voor de ziekte- en arbeidsongeschiktheidskosten van zijn
vaste en tijdelijke medewerkers. Voor een grote werkgever, meer dan 100 medewerkers, kan de
premie 2015 maximaal 4,28% en minimaal 0,33% van de loonsom bedragen. Ook al heeft de werkgever
in het referentiejaar 2013 nul zieken en nul arbeidsongeschiktheidsinstroom gehad, dan
bedraagt de premie toch 0,33%
De materie is complex en in de beschikking staan vaak fouten. www.premiewhk.nl geeft een heldere
uitleg en biedt ondersteuning voor werkgevers om de risico's en de kosten van deze loonkosten te
minimaliseren.

Wat kunnen wij voor U betekenen?
Wij controleren niet alleen uw beschikking op juistheid, maar geven u in begrijpelijke taal ook advies. Daarmee worden de premies in de toekomst zo laag mogelijk gehouden.

Het supportteam van premiewerkhervattingskas.nl wordt gevormd door Gerjan Ananias en Peter van Beusekom. Het team maakt deel uit van Merces Custodio. 
Merces Custodio heeft jarenlange ervaring op het gebied van beheersing van de kosten van ziekteverzuim en arbeidsongeschiktheid voor organisaties. Het team coördineert de noodzakelijke ondersteuning om uw premielast te reduceren.

Indien u schadelast (ziektewet uitkeringen en/of instroom arbeidsongeschiktheid) is toegerekend en u dus niet de minimale premie betaalt zullen wij namens u in bezwaar gaan bij de Belastingdienst en de aan uw organisatie toegerekende schadelast controleren op juistheid.

Name: General Prosecutors Office of Albania
Description:
The General Prosecutor is the head of the General Prosecutor's Office and is responsible for the work of the Prosecution and the prosecution offices at the courts of general jurisdiction of the first instance and the appellate court.
The Prosecutor General is elected by three-fifths of the members of the Assembly, among the three candidates proposed by the High Council of the Prosecution, for a 7-year term and without the right of reappointment. The General Prosecutor is appointed in accordance with Article 148 / a of the Constitution.
The Attorney General represents the prosecution in the High Court and cases in the Constitutional Court, unless represented by the Special Prosecution. The Prosecutor General issues general instructions to prosecutors of general jurisdiction prosecutors and Judicial Police officers and oversees their implementation, reports to the Assembly on the crime situation in the country, asks the High Inspector of Justice to conduct thematic inspections or investigations into individual violations, administers the interception system and exercises other powers according to article 38 of Law no. 97/2016 "On the organization and functioning of the prosecution in the Republic of Albania".

The General Prosecutor's Office has jurisdiction over the entire territory of the Republic of Albania and is headquartered in Tirana.

The General Prosecutor's Office prosecutes and represents the prosecution in court on behalf of the state. The Prosecution Office operates within the judicial system based on the Constitution of the Republic of Albania, and the Organic Law no. 97/2016 “On the organization and functioning of the Prosecution Office in the Republic of Albania”.

The Prosecution is an independent body that guarantees the smooth running, control of its actions and respects the internal independence of prosecutors for investigation and prosecution, according to law.

Name: RooBeek Advies
Description:
RooBeek Advies is een kennisbedrijf en adviesbureau. Wij zijn een adviesbureau op het gebied van ruimtelijke ordening, bouwregelgeving en omgevingsrecht. 

Wij maken complexe regelgeving makkelijk. 

Onze jarenlange ervaring met werken bij én met de overheid maakt dat wij jou ook kunnen helpen. Bovendien kennen wij de looplijnen in het gemeentehuis. Wij spreken de juiste taal om jouw optimaal te kunnen adviseren, jouw plan te begeleiden of soms, gewoon snel een vraag te kunnen beantwoorden.

Name: Legislative Drafting Office, Jersey
Description:
Jersey's Legislative Drafting Office drafts legislation for the States Assembly and the Government of Jersey. 
We are a team of lawyers, aided by our editorial support, who specialise in the preparation of Laws for enactment by the States of Jersey and the King in Council, Regulations to be made by the States of Jersey and Orders to be made by Ministers. We also prepare amendments to legislation on behalf of Ministers, Scrutiny Panels and individual States Members. 
In addition we aim to ensure that the laws of Jersey as displayed on the Jersey Law website are available for access by everyone in a form that is as accurate and up to date as possible.
We are currently running the Computer-Readable Legislation Project https://crlp-jerseyldo.github.io/ looking into how legislative drafters can conveniently flag the logical structure of our drafts for computers to read. That could be by marking up our drafts or making shadow versions in a Controlled Natural Language, and could be helped by AI.

Name: BSP Safety
Description:
BSP is de afkorting van Best Selected Partner en is opgericht in 2017 om u als werkgever wegwijs te maken en advies te verlenen in arbeidsveiligheid. 

Sinds 2006 specialiseerden wij ons in 'welzijn op het werk'. Die expertise willen wij graag met u delen. Omdat wij de know-how bezitten aangaande een veilige werkomgeving, zijn wij voor u de Best Selected Partner. 

Wij bieden preventiediensten aan die nodig zijn om uw preventiebeleid te optimaliseren. Kiest u voor ons, dan kiest u voor de Best Selected Partner in Safety.

Daarbuiten beschikt BSP ook over een vertaler Nederlands – Pools om u bij te staan en te ondersteunen in het vertalen van al uw veiligheidsprocessen.

Kunnen wij uw Partner in veiligheid zijn? Ja, zeker!
Kies je voor ons –  dan kies je voor een Best Selected Partner in Safety.

Onze ervaring is geboren in 2006. Sinds toen hebben wij onze ervaring opgebouwd in verschillende sectoren zoals:
-	chemie, 
-	petrochemie,
-	constructie (tankbouw, liften),
-	bouw,
-	luchtvaart,
-	interieur design,
-	duurzame energie,
-	medische sector

Wij ondersteunen cliënten en aannemers in hun werkzaamheden. 

BSP voorziet o.a.
- veiligheidskundige ondersteuning voor uw shutdown-,  nieuwbouw- of onderhoudsprojecten op fulltime of parttime basis,
- veiligheidscoördinatie niveau B voor uw bouwprojecten,
- een preventieadviseur voor het opzetten van een preventiebeleid voor uw KMO van A tot Z,
- hulp en ondersteuning na een incident of ongeval,
- audits om na te gaan of uw bedrijf voldoet aan de welzijnswet van 4 augustus 1996,
- veiligheidsopleidingen aangepast naar de wensen van de klant,
- een vertaler NL - PL die al uw procedures, instructies, risicoanalyses, opleidingen, interviews, etc. kan verzorgen,
- …

Wij zorgen voor een meer efficiënte en effectievere werking van uw bedrijf en daarbij stellen wij onze dienstverlening steeds voorop. Onze kennis op het gebied van preventie kan zeker bijdragen tot succes van uw bedrijf.

Name: Krajská hospodářská komora Karlovarského kraje
Description:
Silný partner vašeho podnikání
Jsme jediným zákonným zástupcem podnikatelů v ČR, reprezentujeme podnikatele při jednáních se státní správou, místní samosprávou i zahraničními organizacemi. Nabízíme rozsáhlou poradenskou činnost a informační servis, organizujeme širokou škálu vzdělávacích akcí, propojujeme členy s našimi partnery. Pomáháme členům najít lidské zdroje na trhu práce, organizujeme setkávání personalistů, propojujeme školy a zaměstnavatele. Člen komory je zvýhodněn slevou na všechny akce pořádané KHK KK. Buďte spokojený podnikatel a staňte se členem KHK KK.

Informace a poradenství
Najdete u nás veškeré informace a poradenství pro vaše podnikání. Naši odborníci vám poradí v oblasti personalistiky, financí, práva, vzdělávání, dotací, podnikání v zahraničí a řadě dalších. Členům poskytujeme pravidelný informační servis.
Jste začínající podnikatel? Buďte spokojený podnikatel a staňte se členem KHK KK.

Lidské zdroje a personalistika
Pomáháme členům najít zaměstnance na trhu práce, pořádáme veletrhy pracovních příležitostí. Organizujeme pravidelná setkávání personalistů. Spolupracujeme se školami, zařídíme exkurze, přednášky firem na školách, stáže a brigády studentů. Organizujeme školení zaměstnanců firem, zajistíme kurzy na míru i dotované vzdělávání. Staňte se členy KHK KK a buďte spokojený podnikatel.

Vzdělávání
Pro naše členy organizujeme širokou škálu vzdělávacích akcí zdarma nebo s výraznou slevou. Zajistíme kurzy na míru přímo ve firmě s kvalitními a prověřenými lektory. Podporujeme další vzdělávání studentů, rodičů a dalších osob, aby našli dobré uplatnění na trhu práce. Ušetříme vám peníze za vzdělávání vašich zaměstnanců díky evropským dotacím, které pro vás získáváme. Buďte spokojený podnikatel a staňte se členem KHK KK

Kontakty, networking
Zprostředkujeme vám kontakty na veřejnou správu a další organizace v regionu i na celostátní úrovni. Pomůžeme vám sehnat partnery pro vaše podnikání nejen v Karlovarském kraji, ČR, ale i v zahraničí.

Name: The Parliament of Montenegro
Description:
The Parliament is the organ of the legislative power in the country. It is the representative body of the citizens, and it is consisted of MPs that are elected by citizens in direct and secret ballot on the basis of a general and equitable voting right.

Term of office of the Parliament shall last four years, an MP does not have binding mandate, they shall decide and vote according to their own beliefs, they shall enjoy immunity and may not be recalled.An MP shall be elected for every six thousand voters, in the Republic as a unique electorate, on the basis of electoral lists submitted by: political parties (party electoral list), coalitions of political parties (coalition electoral list) and the groups of citizens (electoral list of the group of citizens). Mandate of MPs shall be allocated according to the proportionate, Doont’s electoral principle, i.e. the principle of the largest quotient.

The Parliament shall work in regular and extraordinary sittings. The regular sittings shall be convened twice a year, namely: the first regular session shall start on the first working day in March and shall last until the end of July, and the second one shall start on the first working day in October and shall last until the end of December. The extraordinary session shall be convened at the request of not less than one third of the total number of MPs, or at the request of the President of the Republic and of the Prime Minister, and they shall be convened in the period from the first working day in January until the last working day in February, as well as from the first working day in August until the last working day in September.

Name: New Jersey Senate
Description:
The New Jersey Senate is the powerful upper chamber of the state's legislature responsible for lawmaking, special investigations, and the approval of executive and judicial appointments.

The President of the Senate is Sen. Stephen M. Sweeney, a Democrat who represents the 3rd Legislative District (Gloucester, Salem, Cumberland Counties). The Majority Leader of the New Jersey Senate is Senator Loretta Weinberg, also a Democrat who represents the 37th Legislative District (Bergen County).

Name: The Legislative Assembly of Manitoba
Description:
The Legislative Assembly is an independent entity, separate from the Government of Manitoba. The 57 Members of the Assembly are elected in single-member constituencies to represent the people of Manitoba and the main function is to enact legislation. The Office of the Clerk is the administrative arm of the Legislative Assembly of Manitoba and The Clerk is the procedural advisor to the Speaker and all Members. The Speaker of the Legislative Assembly is elected by its Members to serve as the Presiding Officer. The Assembly’s mission is to enhance the legislative process and service to the public through the provision of non-partisan knowledge and advice to Members and Assembly Offices. The Legislative Assembly employs a diverse group of individuals with a range of skills and qualifications to suit a variety of positions.

For more information about the Legislative Assembly of Manitoba, please visit our website at:
http://www.gov.mb.ca/legislature/

Name: Dansk Producentansvar (DPA)
Description:
National register for EPR
DPA (Danish Producer Responsibility) is the statutory body set pursuant to the Danish Environmental Protection Act to administer the rules relating to the EU- regulation on producer responsibility (EPR) for Electric- and Electronic Equipment (WEEE), Batteries and Accumulators and Cars (ELV). The aim of DPA-System is to ensure the IT-development and operation of the National Producer Register and to set up simple, financially reasonable and fair rules and procedures for the all actors involved in the market of waste and resources.

Name: Consillium Soluções Institucionais e Governamentais
Description:
Em 2013, os sócios Antônio Augusto de Queiroz, Thiago Rego de Queiroz e Enrico Monteiro Ribeiro, fundaram a Queiroz Assessoria em Relações Institucionais e Governamentais, uma empresa com foco no atendimento personalizado para seus clientes.

Com a perspectiva de crescimento e aprofundamento da qualidade do atendimento, em 2022 a Queiroz Assessoria passou a se chamar Consillium Soluções em Relações Governamentais, oferecendo experiência em análise de risco político, monitoramento inteligente dos fluxos decisórios, mapeamento de stakeholders, serviço de Advocacy e de defesa de interesses com assessoramento em atividades de campo, com relevo para o trabalho junto aos Poderes Legislativo e Executivo em âmbito Federal.

Name: Office of the Child and Youth Advocate
Description:
We provide individual and systemic advocacy for young people receiving designated services as defined under Alberta's Child and Youth Advocate Act. This includes young people receiving or attempting to access services under the Child, Youth and Family Enhancement Act and the Protection of Sexually Exploited Children Act, as well as young people involved with the youth justice system. 

We also provide access to legal representation for young people receiving child intervention services, offer public education about our office and the rights of young people, and conduct investigations into serious injuries and deaths of young people receiving designated services.

Name: Cyprus Gaming and Casino Supervision Commission
Description:
The Commission is the regulator for casino operations in the Republic of Cyprus. We license and regulate both the casino operator and individuals working in the casino industry, including casino employees, machine suppliers, junket operators, and those providing test laboratory services.

In addition to licensing and regulating the casino operator and individuals working in the casino industry, we have a duty to protect the public, including vulnerable groups and young people, from the negative effects of casino gaming and to implement appropriate protective measures where necessary.

We have achieved a great deal since the Commission’s establishment in 2017 and becoming operational in January 2018. In recent years, we have established a new regulatory framework and supervisory capabilities for casino gaming in Cyprus through the ICR. We continuously review and refine it to ensure it remains fit for purpose.

Name: Law Commission Te Aka Matua o te Ture
Description:
The Law Commission’s role is to promote the systematic review, reform and development of the law of New Zealand. As an independent Crown Entity, its functions are to review the law and make recommendations for improvement. 

Additionally, the Law Commission advises the Minister and government agencies on ways in which the law of New Zealand can be made as understandable and accessible as is practicable. 

The Commission has a commitment to consult the public on areas of law that are being reviewed. It promotes discussion and consultation through its issues papers series, and invites submissions from the public prior to making its recommendations for law reform to the Minister. 

These recommendations are published in its report series, and the government then decides what future amendments are to be made to the law.

Name: The Supreme Legislation Committee
Description:
إن اللجنة العليا للتشريعات هي الجهة المختصة في الإمارة بكافة المسائل المتعلقة بالتشريعات والاتفاقيات والمعاهدات الدولية، وتنفرد دون غيرها بتمثيل الحكومة والجهات الحكومية في جميع المسائل المتعلقة بالتشريعات الاتحادية والاتفاقيات الخارجية والمعاهدات الدولية.

The Supreme Legislation Committee has jurisdiction over all matters relating to legislation and international treaties and conventions. The SLC has exclusive jurisdiction to represent the government and government entities in all matters relating to federal legislation, and  international treaties and conventions.

Name: Texas Sunset Advisory Commission
Description:
The Texas Sunset Advisory Commission is a 12-member legislative commission that identifies ways to eliminate waste, duplication, and inefficiency in state government. The Sunset process questions the continuing need for an agency, identifies agency programs that duplicate other public services, and recommends ways to improve the agency's efficiency and effectiveness. 

About 130 state agencies come under Sunset review on a rotating basis, typically once every 12 years. The Sunset Commission makes recommendations to the Legislature for each agency, and most agencies are automatically abolished unless the Legislature passes a bill to continue them.

Public participation is invaluable to the Sunset process and is welcomed at every stage to ensure everyone can have a say on agencies under Sunset review. Individuals, organizations, and businesses directly or indirectly affected by an agency have first-hand knowledge and experiences with the agency that help Sunset identify problems and opportunities for improvement.

The Sunset process has streamlined and changed state government since its inception in 1977. As of 2019, the Legislature has enacted 80 percent of the Sunset Commission’s recommendations to improve state government. including completely abolishing 41 agencies and abolishing another 51 agencies and transferring some or all of their functions to another agency. 

The Sunset process also saves taxpayers money, with an estimated $1 billion in state and federal savings and revenue gains based on fiscal notes for Sunset bills between 1982 and 2019. This amounts to a return of $19 for every $1 the Legislature has appropriated to the Sunset Commission.

To learn more about the Sunset process and to provide formal feedback on an agency undergoing Sunset review, visit the Sunset website at https://www.sunset.texas.gov.

Name: Notaria X
Description:
Notariax es una plataforma digital que permite a las personas realizar todos sus trámites de manera rápida, segura y fácil. Al centralizar estos procesos en un solo lugar, ahorramos hasta un 90% del tiempo que habitualmente se emplea en ellos, mejorando la forma en que los ciudadanos interactúan con los servicios notariales con una solución 100% online. Además, brindamos beneficios clave como la reducción de costos operacionales y de transporte, el alivio del estrés y otras enfermedades profesionales.
Estamos modernizando un sector tradicional, haciéndolo más accesible para todos. Creemos que nuestra visión tiene un fuerte impacto social, ayudando a las personas a resolver problemas cotidianos de manera más ágil y eficiente.

Name: United States Congress Joint Economic Committee
Description: The Joint Economic Committee (JEC) was created when Congress passed the Employment Act of 1946. Under this Act, Congress established two advisory panels: the President's Council of Economic Advisers (CEA) and the Joint Economic Committee. Their primary tasks are to review economic conditions and to recommend improvements in economic policy. Chairmanship of the Committee alternates between the Senate and House every Congress.

Name: State of Wyoming Legislature
Description: The Wyoming Legislature is a 93-member citizen legislature, meaning the members elected serve part-time. The Legislature meets yearly for a General Session in odd numbered years and for a Budget Session in even numbered years. The Legislature employs a small non-partisan staff to provide administrative and professional services to the state’s legislative branch.

Name: Assembleia Nacional de Angola
Description: A Assembleia Nacional é o Parlamento da República de Angola, um órgão unicameral, representativo de todos os angolanos, que exprime a vontade soberana do povo e exerce o poder legislativo do Estado.

Name: Peijnenburg Verzuimbegeleiding
Description:
Peijnenburg Verzuimbegeleiding is een zeer betrokken arbodienst met oog voor werkgever én werknemer. Vanaf dag één heb je een eigen contactpersoon/casemanager. Wij zijn een hecht team en hebben er plezier in om onze klanten proactief en persoonlijk te ondersteunen. Snel schakelen en flexibele dienstverlening door korte lijnen, dat is waar we voor staan. 
Elke organisatie is uniek; samen kijken we hoe we de verzuimbegeleiding zo effectief mogelijk kunnen aanpakken; afgestemd op jouw wensen en behoeften. 
Onze professionals – casemanagers, bedrijfsartsen, arbeidsdeskundigen, re-integratieconsulenten- beschikken over ruime kennis en ervaring en zijn allen specialist in hun vakgebied. 
Zo weten we wat er binnen je organisatie speelt en gaan we voor een optimaal resultaat, zodat een verzuimende medewerker niet langer dan noodzakelijk uit het arbeidsproces is en je als werkgever de focus kan leggen op je kernactiviteiten.

Name: Cabildo Metropolitano de Caracas
Description:
El Cabildo Metropolitano es el órgano legislativo del Área Metropolitana de Caracas, integrado por concejales electos por cada uno de los municipios constituyentes: Libertador, Chacao, Sucre, Baruta y El Hatillo. En él se sancionan las ordenanzas que rigen para todos los habitantes de los cinco municipios que conforman el Distrito Metropolitano de Caracas. 

La institución está conformada por trece Concejales Metropolitanos principales y suplentes, todos elegidos a través del voto de manera directa, libre y democrática, para un período de cuatro años. 

Cada uno de los ediles titulares preside una comisión permanente, las cuales constituyen la estructura organizativa del órgano legislativo. El Cabildo Metropolitano cuenta con una Presidencia y una Vicepresidencia, encargadas de ejercer la representación de la institución y coordinar tanto los servicios de Secretaría como los Servicios Administrativos, Servicios Legislativos, y Servicios de Comunicación y Participación Ciudadana. También cuenta con una Secretaría, cuya función es brindar apoyo a las funciones de la institución y de los concejales, con asistencia de la Subsecretaría y bajo la dirección de la Presidencia.

Description: Thico Group Pvt. Ltd. is the brainchild of Ms. Thilini Priyamali is a duly registered company which is well diversified in nature. Catering into a range of industries including construction, entertainment, gem and jewellery, real estate and trading, the Company aims to attract a diverse clientele. Operating from 34th floor, World Trade Centre, each avenue falls under respective companies managed by industry experts who ensure efficiency and growth. Name: Legislative Services Agency
Description:
The agency provides technical support and services such as bill drafting, committee staffing, research, document processing, fiscal analysis, program evaluation, publication of legislative documents, technology services and other information to the General Assembly as needed.

Legislative Services Agency staff has drafted an average of 7,289 bills, amendments, motions and committee reports per year (avg from 2010 to 2016).

"the service and administrative agency of the General Assembly to assist it in the performance of its constitutional responsibilities as a separate and independent legislative branch of state government."

Name: U.S. House Committee on Ways & Means
Description:
The Committee on Ways and Means is the oldest committee of the United States Congress, and is the chief tax-writing committee in the House of Representatives. The Committee derives a large share of its jurisdiction from Article I, Section VII of the U.S. Constitution which declares, “All Bills for raising Revenue shall originate in the House of Representatives.”

First established as a select committee on July 24, 1789, it was discharged less than two months later. The committee was reappointed from the first session of the Fourth Congress in 1795, and was formally listed as a standing committee in the House Rules on January 7, 1802.

Until 1865, the jurisdiction of the committee (referred to as the Committee of Ways and Means before 1880) included the critically important areas of revenue, appropriations, and banking. Since 1865, the committee has continued to exercise jurisdiction over revenue and related issues such as tariffs, reciprocal trade agreements, and the bonded debt of the United States. Revenue-related aspects of the Social Security system, Medicare, and social services programs have come within Ways and Means’ purview in the 20th century.

The roster of committee members who have gone on to serve in higher office is impressive. Eight Presidents and eight Vice Presidents have served on Ways and Means, as have 21 Speakers of the House of Representatives, and four Justices of the Supreme Court.

Name: PreBeCo
Description:
PreBeCo is gespecialiseerd in de begeleiding van bedrijven betreffende preventie, arbeidsveiligheid en welzijn op het werk. Het opstellen van risicoanalyses is onze passie, uw veiligheid en bescherming onze prioriteit!

Jaren geleden zijn we tot de ontdekking gekomen dat welzijn en bescherming op het werk (preventie) voor de “kleinere” KMO niet toegankelijk was. Daarom besloten wij deze behoeften in te vullen en zijn wij gestart met ons bedrijf.

Als specialist inzake preventie en arbeidsveiligheid hebben wij twee missies. Onze eerste missie is de werkplek van onze klant zo veilig mogelijk maken. Als tweede zien we het als onze missie om bedrijven en zaakvoerders zo goed mogelijk in regel te stellen met de welzijnswet.

Name: CALICER
Description:
CALICER es una Entidad de Certificación de producto agroalimentario acreditada por ENAC.

Prestamos servicios principalmente en España y Portugal, nos avala una amplia trayectoria profesional en el campo de la certificación de todo tipo de productos en el sector agroalimentario.

Name: Alberta Ombudsman
Description:
The Alberta Ombudsman provides oversight of the provincial government to ensure fair treatment through independent investigations and recommendations within Alberta government authorities, municipal government, professional organizations and the Patient Concerns Resolution Process of Alberta Health Services. 

The Alberta Ombudsman objectively investigates complaints to determine whether a public agency in question has acted fairly and reasonably, and whether their actions and decisions were consistent with relevant legislation, policies and procedures. Impartial and independent from government, the Ombudsman is open, approachable and responsive to the questions and concerns of all Albertans.

The Alberta Ombudsman is also Alberta's Public Interest Commissioner.

Name: Internado Legislativo Jorge A. Ramos Comas
Description: El Programa de Internado Legislativo Jorge Alberto Ramos Comas, fue creado en virtud de la Ley 184-1996 y está dirigido a ofrecer estudiantes universitarios una experiencia educativa que combine los elementos teóricos y prácticos de los procesos legislativos y su integración con las demás Ramas de Gobierno. Promueve una mayor conciencia entre los participantes de la importancia del proceso legislativo en la consecución del bien común. A su vez, se desarrolla el talento de peritaje y el interés futuro en mantenerse ligados a la Rama Legislativa. El Programa es presidido por el Representante Héctor E. Ferrer Santiago.

Name: Maryland House of Delegates
Description: I am a candidate for the Maryland House of Delegates, the lower house of the Maryland State Legislature, located in Annapolis.

Name: Office of U.S. Senator David Perdue
Description: David A. Perdue was elected Georgia's Junior Senator on November 4, 2014. Perdue is a successful business leader with 40 years of real world business experience who helped grow some of America’s most recognizable companies including Sara Lee, Haggar, and Reebok. As a Fortune 500 CEO, David led the impressive expansion of Dollar General, creating thousands of quality jobs and adding billions to the value of the company.

Name: Landtag Brandenburg - Verwaltung
Description:
Die Landtagsverwaltung ist Dienstleister für das Parlament und die Bürgerinnen und Bürger des Landes Brandenburg. Aufgabe der Landtagsverwaltung ist es, den möglichst reibungslosen Ablauf des parlamentarischen Betriebes sicherzustellen und die organisatorischen, technischen und materiellen Voraussetzungen für die Arbeit der Abgeordneten im Landtag zu schaffen, soweit dies nicht Aufgabe der Fraktionen ist. 

Die aus ca. 160 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern bestehende Landtagsverwaltung gliedert sich in zwei Abteilungen: die Abteilung P (Parlament) und die Abteilung V (Verwaltung). Diese beiden Abteilungen sind in unterschiedliche Referate untergliedert:

•	Referat P1: Plenum, Präsidium, Parlament. Geschäftsstelle, Parlamentsrecht, Europaangelegenheiten
•	Referat P2: Ausschussdienst
•	Referat P3: Sekretariat Petitionsausschuss
•	Referat P4: Stenografischer Dienst
•	Referat P5: Informationsdienste
•	Referat V1: Abgeordnetenrecht, Abgeordnetenangelegenheiten
•	Referat V2: IT-Service und -Sicherheit, Kommunikationstechnik
•	Referat V3: Organisation, Haushalt, Koordination Gebäudemanagement
•	Referat V4: Justiziariat, Personal

In einer organisatorisch eigenständigen Stabsstelle Öffentlichkeitsarbeit, Presse, Protokoll, Besucherservice wird die Arbeit der Landtagspräsidentin koordiniert. Zudem hat der Landtag einen Parlamentarischen Beratungsdienst eingerichtet, dessen Aufgabe es ist, die Präsidentin des Landtages, die Ausschüsse und sonstigen Gremien sowie die Fraktionen in rechtlichen Fragen zu beraten.

Diese unterschiedlichen Fachbereiche eröffnen unterschiedliche Berufsmöglichkeiten. Wir suchen regemäßig neue Kolleginnen und Kollegen. Gerne können Sie sich auf unserer Website über die Landtagsverwaltung als Arbeitgeber und aktuelle Stellenangebote informieren.

Name: Adviesbureau Kole
Deudas Judiciales Perú
Description:
Actualmente muchas personas están pasando por procesos judiciales donde ponen en riesgo su propiedad dada en garantía. Estás propiedades pueden entrar en Remate Judicial, y las familias llegan a ser desalojadas, sin saber que existe una solución.

Somos especialistas en este tipo de procesos judiciales y si este es tu caso, ponemos a su disposición un staff de abogados expertos que le ayudarán. Buscándole la solución a su caso. Ofrecemos atención personalizada con profesionales de alta categoría, que luego de la revisión de su expediente, le darán las soluciones que más se adapten a sus necesidades y situación actual.

Servicios:

Cobranza de Cartera de Clientes: Los pilares de nuestra gestión de cobranza son la negociación directa, conociendo la situación de los deudores, la localización de los mismos mediante una permanente actualización de las bases de datos, y un trabajo de recuperación de cartera basada en la definición de los perfiles de los deudores, ajustando nuestra gestión a la medida de cada cliente deudor.

Defensa Judicial: Consiste en la utilización de múltiples herramientas que proporciona la legislación nacional vigente, tales como alegar prescripción de la deuda ya sea total o parcial, promover incidentes de abandono de procedimiento por negligencia de la parte demandante, interponer excepciones y tercerías dentro del marco de nuestro procedimiento judicial a fin de conseguir una situación más favorable para nuestros representados.

Plan Reactiva: Muchas pequeñas y medianas empresas en las que el crédito “Reactiva Perú” no fue suficiente para sacarlos adelante y que sus ingresos actuales no alcanzan para cubrir los gastos mensuales deberán cumplir con el banco incluso con su patrimonio personal.
En Deudas Judiciales Perú contamos con especialistas donde les brindaremos alterna.

Name: Michigan Senate
Description:
The legislative power of the State of Michigan is vested in a bicameral (2-chamber) body comprised of a Senate and a House of Representatives. 

The Michigan Senate, one-half of the state's bicameral legislative body, consists of 38 members who are elected to represent the 212,400 to 263,500 residents of their respective districts. Senators are elected at the same time as the Governor and serve 4-year terms concurrent with the governor's term of office. Terms for Senators begin on January 1, following the November general election.

Name: Nederlandse Vereniging voor Wetgeving
Description: De Nederlandse Vereniging voor Wetgeving is er voor iedereen die geïnteresseerd is in of op de een of andere manier te maken heeft met wetgevingsvraagstukken. Via jaarvergaderingen en studiemiddagen biedt de vereniging vanuit verschillende perspectieven eenieder die vanuit wetenschap of praktijk bij de totstandkoming en toepassing van regelgeving betrokken is een forum voor debat over wetgeving en wetgevingsbeleid.

Name: Small Business Legislative Council (SBLC)
Description: Since its creation in 1976, SBLC has grown dramatically to represent nearly every sector of our economy including manufacturing, retailing, distribution, professional and technical services, agriculture, transportation, tourism, and construction. SBLC has become a unified force that is respected throughout the government. The Council's views are sought and its opinions are valued by those in government who must decide how the laws of this nation are enacted and enforced.

Name: CA Asian American and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus
Description: The AAPI Legislative Caucus will continue to serve, represent, and advocate for the interests of the AAPI community and all Californians. With the continued growth and political involvement of the AAPI community, we hope to continue addressing the needs of this population in order to bring positive changes to our communities.

Name: Dewan Perwakilan Mahasiswa FIA UB
Description: Dewan Perwakilan Mahasiswa Fakultas Ilmu Administrasi Universitas Brawijaya merupakan lembaga legislatif tertinggi di lingkup Fakultas Ilmu Administrasi Universitas Brawijaya. Mengacu pada AD/ART sebagai Dasar hukum berdirinya, Dewan Perwakilan Mahasiswa terdiri dari 9 Anggota yang dipilih berdasarkan Pemilihan Wakil Mahasiswa (Pemilwa) Fakultas Ilmu Administrasi yang dalam pelaksanaannya para dewan dibantu oleh staff ahli komisi.

Name: Sherf Motion Technologies LTD
Description:
Sherf Motion Technologies Ltd. Was Founded In 1989 By Moshe Sherf And Operates In The Area Of Industrial Control Specializing In Motion Systems.
The Company Is Among Israel’s Leading Veteran Companies In This Field.
The Sherf Motion Technologies Ltd. Company Is The Exclusive Representor In Israel Of Some Of The Leading Companies In The World Such As MITSUBISHI, KINKO, TRIO, ELTRA and etc.

Name: New Jersey General Assembly
Description: The New Jersey General Assembly is the lower house of the New Jersey Legislature.

Name: Ibaraki City Court
Description: This is a government agency

Name: ACT Legislative Assembly
Description:
The Legislative Assembly for the Australian Capital Territory is the parliament for the nation's capital, established after self-government in 1989. It performs both territory- and local-level functions and makes decisions that impact the lives of everyone who lives and works in the ACT.

The Assembly has 25 members who are elected every four years. They are supported by political staff and, if they are a minister, by public servants from government directorates. 

The Office of the Legislative Assembly is the parliament's support organisation. It provides procedural and administrative advice and support to the Assembly and its committees. The Office is non-political and independent from the Executive.

Name: Sameffekt AB
Description:
Sameffekt hjälper små och medelstora företag med hållbart företagande. Vi bidrar till att skapa framgångsrika företag genom säkra, stimulerande och utvecklande arbetsplatser.

Sameffekt jobbar också på uppdrag mot kunder inom arbetsmiljö. Exempelvis så kan vi utifrån ett specifikt behov hjälpa företag med skyddsronder och riskbedömningar. Vi kan åta oss det mesta inom arbetsmiljöområdet men även rena personalfrågor.

Name: Washington State House Republicans
Description: We are 39 independently elected state representatives whose views are shaped by our personal values and the needs of the communities we represent. It is our job to listen to our constituents, amplify their voices in the Legislature, and advocate for solutions that will make Washington state a better place to live, work, and raise a family. We encourage you to learn more about our ideas, share our content with your family and friends, and get involved in the legislative process. Together, we can make a difference.

Name: Nederlandse Vereniging voor Energierecht (NeVER)
Description:
De afgelopen jaren heeft het energierecht een grote vlucht genomen. Door de liberalisering van de elektriciteit- en de gasmarkt en door ontwikkelingen op het gebied van de opsporing en winning van delfstoffen en de opkomst van duurzame energie hebben zowel juristen binnen de overheid als in het bedrijfsleven, de advocatuur en de wetenschap zich gericht op de bestudering van de ontwikkelingen binnen dit nieuwe rechtsgebied.

Voor alle geïnteresseerden in dit rechtsgebied in ontwikkeling wil NeVER een forum zijn.

NeVER stelt zich daarbij ten doel:

1. Het bevorderen van de interesse in en het verspreiden van de kennis van het energierecht in de breedste zin;
2. Het bevorderen van de onderlinge contacten tussen de leden.

Om deze doelen te verwezenlijken organiseert de vereniging bijeenkomsten in vele vormen (zoals discussiebijeenkomsten, seminars en cursussen), stimuleert zij het publiceren van artikelen en andere stukken en onderhoudt zij contacten in binnen- en buitenland ten behoeve van de leden.

Name: Town of Paradise
Description:
The Town of Paradise is a community of 9,000 residents in the beautiful Sierra Nevada foothills about 15 miles east of Chico and 80 miles north of Sacramento.  Since 2018, Paradise has been recovering and rebuilding after experiencing the 2018 Camp Fire. 

Founded in November 1979, the Town is a full-service municipality offering police protection; fire prevention, suppression and medical aid; community development, planning and building safety; public works, capital improvements, and street maintenance; and housing and business development programs. The Town is run through a council-manager form of city government. The Paradise Town Council is the chief policy making body for the Town. The Council is comprised of five members elected at large by the community to four-year staggered terms of office. The Town Manager leads staff in executing the vision and priorities established by the Town Council.

Name: U.S. Senate Majority Leader Harry Reid

Name: Office of the Representative for Children and Youth
Description: Since 2007, British Columbia’s Representative for Children and Youth has supported our province’s young people and their families in dealing with the provincial child and youth welfare system. The Representative also provides oversight to this system, makes recommendations to improve it, and reports to the B.C. Legislative Assembly (not a government ministry).

Name: Legislative Assembly Service - Saskatchewan
Description: The Legislative Assembly Service (LAS) provides administrative and support services required for the operation of the Legislative Assembly. The LAS is an entity separate from government that provides nonpartisan, procedural, administrative and educational services to the Members of the Legislative Assembly. For more information about the Legislative Assembly Service - Saskatchewan please visit legassembly.sk.ca.

Name: Office of the Revisor of Statutes, Minnesota Legislature
Description: The Revisor's Office is a nonpartisan office of the Minnesota Legislature. The office provides confidential drafting services of legislative and administrative documents. Since its founding in 1939, the office has served as the compiler of Minnesota Statutes and is the official publisher of Minnesota Statutes, Laws, and Rules.

Name: Senado de la República Dominicana
Description:
Participativo, Inclusivo y Transparente 

El Senado de la República Dominicana nace el 6 de Noviembre del año 1844, con el nombre de Consejo Conservador, sus miembros eran elegidos por la vía indirecta, cada seis años, por los electores de cada Provincia, en los mismos colegios electorales que los miembros del Tribunado.

Actualmente, el Senado de la República está compuesto por 32 senadores, elegidos mediante voto directo por un período de cuatro años.

Nos encontramos en el edificio del Congreso Nacional, donde, junto a la Cámara de Diputados, conformamos un órgano bicameral que representa el Poder Legislativo de la República Dominicana.

Name: California Advocates, Inc. (Lobbying and Association Management Services)
Description:
Established in 1971, California Advocates, Inc. is California’s oldest contract advocacy firm, currently serving nearly 70 clients. Over the years, we have provided professional advocacy services for a broad range of corporations, associations, local governments, and special districts on a myriad of public policy issues before the legislature and regulatory agencies.

In 1991, we established California Advocates Management Services (CAMS) at the encouragement of our clients who sought our expertise in the management of their internal matters. With the formation of CAMS, California Advocates uniquely combines a solution based legislative and regulatory advocacy firm with a full-service association management firm capable of providing an array of services from complete management services, meeting planning, and major trade shows.

Name: Arkansas House of Representatives
Description:
The Arkansas House of Representatives is one of the two chambers of the legislative branch of Arkansas state government. Combined, the two bodies form the Arkansas General Assembly, which convenes in Regular Session in every odd-numbered year, and in Fiscal Session in every even-numbered year.

The House of Representatives consists of 100 Members elected from 100 districts, which are apportioned across Arkansas.

Name: Attorney General's Chambers, Brunei Darussalam
Description: The Attorney General's Chambers is the office of the Attorney General who is the legal advisor to His Majesty the Sultan and Yang Di-Pertuan of Brunei Darussalam and to the government of His Majesty.

Name: National Security Congressional Staff Association
Description: NSCSA is a bipartisan, bicameral congressional staff organization founded to improve the national security policymaking process on the hill by strengthening staff relationships, providing networking opportunities, and hosting a variety of events with experts in the national security industry.

Name: Pi&Boluda
Description:
Pi & Boluda, Abogados y Fiscalistas, es un despacho multidisciplinar integrado por abogados especializados en derecho bancario y de consumo.

-Ley de Segunda Oportunidad.

Name: Agenda Legislativa S.C.
Description:
Despacho especializado en Análisis, Monitoreo y Asesoría Legislativa / Cabildeo / Litigio Estratégico.

Nuestras actividades comprenden el análisis legislativo, la consultoría parlamentaria, el cabildeo empresarial privado y legislativo, así como el litigio estratégico ante autoridades jurisdiccionales.

Generamos diversas estrategias de posicionamiento mediático y de comunicación, especializados para empresas, personajes del ámbito político y privado.

Contamos con un área de monitoreo, análisis e inteligencia legislativa de las actividades realizadas en el Congreso de la Unión y Congresos Locales.

Desarrollamos estrategias de consecución y cumplimiento de las agendas legislativas tanto a nivel nacional como internacional.

Name: PoortWachter Expertise Centrum
Description:
"Dé expert die meedenkt in alle vraagstukken op het gebied van verzuim en re-integratie."


De experts van het PoortWachter Expertise Centrum zijn al jarenlang de sparringpartner voor verzuim- en re-integratievragen! 

Wij denken mee in de uitvoering van uw wettelijke rol als regisseur van het verzuim, bieden hulp bij wet-  en regelgeving én zijn experts op het gebied van sociale verzekeringen. 
Onze kennis delen wij graag, zodat u snel zelf weer grip op de situatie en de kosten krijgt. Voor u niet beheersbare en ingewikkelde casussen schrikken ons niet af, maar vormen een uitdaging. Daagt u ons uit? Met onze expertise bespaart u kosten.

Onze dienstverlening:

Advisering: 
Vanuit onze kennis en jarenlange ervaring denken we mee bij problematisch, frequent en langdurig verzuim. Wij analyseren de situatie en helpen concreet bij het oplossen van de ontstane problemen. 
En daarbij delen wij graag onze kennis, zodat u hier in het vervolg uw voordeel mee kunt doen.
 	
Verzuim
Omdat het bevorderen van de Eigen Regierol centraal staat in onze verzuimbegeleiding hebben wij zelf een verzuimsysteem ontwikkeld wat dit proces vanuit transparantie ondersteund en ook uw werknemer vanaf dag 1 (!) actief betrekt bij de re-integratie.  Onze casemanagers werken in taakdelegatie, dus draait bij ons niet alles om 'spreekuren bij de bedrijfsarts'. 
Daarbij realiseren wij ons ook dat de gegeven adviezen bedrijfseconomische raakvlakken hebben en sluiten daar dus bij aan in ons advies. 

 Mobiliteit
Wij bieden ook oplossingen bij en voor concrete re-integratiebegeleiding. Of het daarbij gaat om begeleiding bij terugkeer in het eigen werk/eigen organisatie, of om een volledig 2e -spoor re-integratietraject: Wij kijken wat er (echt) nodig is, en zijn gericht op maatwerk. Wij weten dat het voor uw werknemer zaak is om goede en duurzame keuzes te maken... al is deze zichzelf daar vaak nog niet van bewust.
Ook hier: Wij zijn van een transparant en eerlijk verhaal.

Name: Montana Legislature
Description:
The Montana Legislative Branch is one of the 3 branches of state government in Montana.  The Legislature is the branch of state government responsible for making the laws needed to maintain public order and ensure the basic security of state. The executive implements the laws passed by the Legislature, and the judiciary interprets the laws and settles any differences of opinion about what they mean and how they should be applied.
The organization consists of 5 entities: Legislative Audit Division, Legislative Fiscal Division, Legislative Services Division, House, and Senate.
The first 3 divisions have permanent staff that work year round,  The House and Senate have staff that come in only for 4 months every other year since the Montana legislature is a part time citizen legislature.

Name: Alabama State House of Representatives
Description: I am running for the Republican nomination for District 62 of the Alabama State House of Representatives.  It would be a great honor to represent the people of the eastern and southern end of Tuscaloosa County in the Alabama Legislature.  I would be happy to speak to you about this at greater length should you have an interest.

Name: Parliament of South Australia
Description:
This is the official LinkedIn of the Parliament of South Australia. 

Parliament House, on North Terrace in Adelaide South Australia, is the home of the South Australian Parliament. The Parliament is made up of two houses, the House of Assembly and the Legislative Council. 

Comments are moderated. This account is politically neutral, independent of any political parties/politicians and the work of the Government of South Australia. If you would like to engage in a discussion about politics, we recommend that you contact your local Member, or a Member of the Legislative Council.

Name: Colorado Senate
Description:
The Colorado Senate consists of thirty-five Senators, who are elected to four-year terms. Each Senator is limited to serving two consecutive four-year terms. The President of the Senate is elected by the members of the Senate and is the presiding officer. The Senate meets every year in regular session beginning no later than the second Wednesday in January. Regular session lasts no longer than one hundred twenty calendar days.

The Colorado Senate staff includes nonpartisan and partisan employees. The Senate Services staff is nonpartisan and serves all members of the Senate. Additionally, each caucus has its own partisan staff.  Staff positions range from full-time, year-round to session-only seasonal jobs.

Name: Office of the Utah Legislative Auditor General
Description:
The Utah Constitution Article VI Section 3 states, "The Legislature shall appoint a legislative auditor to serve at its pleasure. The legislative auditor shall have authority to conduct audits of any funds, functions, and accounts in any branch, department, agency or political subdivision of this state and shall perform such other related duties as may be prescribed by the Legislature. He shall report to and be answerable only to the Legislature."

Established in 1975, the mission of the Legislative Auditor General is to audit, lead, achieve. We help organizations improve. 

For media inquiries, please reach out directly to the audit manager or contact us at lag@le.utah.gov.

Name: Papua New Guinea Parliament
Description: This is the official Papua New Guinea Parliament LinkedIn page, administered by the Parliamentary Media Services of Parliamentary Service, a State Service provided for under Section 132 of the Constitution of Papua New Guinea

Name: Maryland Legislative Latino Caucus
Description: The Maryland Legislative Latino Caucus (MLLC) was created in 2014 by just a handful of Latino members of the General Assembly. From its initiation, the MLLC has been dedicated to advocating for equity and adequate representation for Latinos and immigrant populations in the legislature. Today, the MLLC has a body of more than fifty members. That's more than fifty state Senators and Delegates that are working together to be the voice for Latinos in the Maryland General Assembly.

Name: חדד רוט שנהר ושות' משרד עורכי דין - Hadad Roth Shenhar & Co Law Office
Description:
משרדנו מציע ללקוחותיו ליווי וייעוץ משפטי ומקצועי במגוון רחב של תחומי המשפט המסחרי והליטיגציה, תחת קורת גג אחת.
המשרד נוסד על ידי עורכי הדין עמית חדד ואריאל רוט המחזיקים בניסיון ייחודי וחריג בסקטור המשפטי בישראל, פועל יוצא של שנות פעילותם הרבות כשותפים במשרד י. וינרוט ושות', ובדגש על ייצוג אנשי מפתח במשק הישראלי לרבות ראש ממשלה, אישי ציבור בכירים, חברי כנסת ואנשי עסקים מהשורה הראשונה.
המשרד מלווה במומחיות רבה לקוחות בעלי פרופיל תקשורתי, ציבורי ועסקי גבוה, ביניהם בכירים במשק הישראלי במגזר הציבורי והעסקי, שרים בעבר ובהווה, ראשי רשויות מקומיות, חברות מובילות במשק ועוד. המשרד מקפיד על מעורבות השותפים בכל תיק ועניין, תוך מיצוי כל הליך ויצירת פתרונות אולטימטיביים לכל לקוח.
למשרד חדד, רוט, שנהר ושות' הידע והמומחיות לספק שירות משפטי ברמה הגבוהה ביותר, והוא מהווה One-Stop-Shop לכלל תחומי המשפט, במטרה לספק ללקוחותיו שירות הוליסטי ומקיף לכל צרכיהם – החל מייצוג בתיקי ליטיגציה מורכבת והליכי צווארון לבן, וכלה בייצוג עסקאות נדל"ן, M&A, ייצוג בתחום דיני עבודה, משפט מנהלי, מיסים, דיני עמותות ועוד.
המשרד מייצג את לקוחותיו בערכאות השיפוטיות הגבוהות ביותר, בישראל ומעבר לים, לרבות בית המשפט הגבוה לצדק, בוררויות בינלאומיות ועוד.
בנוסף, מייצג המשרד קליינטורה ייחודית ועתירת הון של לקוחות פרטיים בעסקאות הנדל"ן, התקשרויות מסחריות, רגולציה וכן מעניק ייעוץ שוטף לחברות ולבכירים במשק הישראלי.
מיום היווסדו נהנה המשרד מצמיחה חסרת תקדים, בין היתר, בשל הסינרגיה בין המחלקות השונות המייצרות ערך גדול ללקוח ומספקות מענה רב תחומי מקיף.

Name: Zambia Law Development Commission
Equal Opportunity Commission of Trinidad and Tobago
Description:
The Equal Opportunity Commission’s mandate is to work towards eliminating discrimination and promoting equality and good relations between persons of different statuses.
The EOC was established by Section 26(1) of the Equal Opportunity Act 2000 (the Act), for the purpose of exercising the jurisdiction conferred upon it by that Act.
A person who believes that they have been subjected to discrimination may lodge a complaint with the EOC.  The EOC is mandated to receive, investigate and as far as possible, conciliate complaints. The EOC investigates every complaint lodged. Services at the EOC are free of charge up until the stage of conciliation.
If the matter is unresolved, the complaint can be referred to the Equal Opportunity Tribunal (EOT). The EOT is a superior court of record and its mandate is to hear and adjudicate on matters referred to it by the EOC. The EOT has the power to make orders, declarations and awards of compensation as it determines to be appropriate.
The Act seeks to protect persons against discrimination under four categories:
•	Employment
•	Education
•	Provision of Goods and Services
•	Provision of Accommodation
Under the Act, persons are entitled to equality and fair treatment, despite their status. The seven status grounds covered by the Act are:
•	Race
•	Ethnicity
•	Religion
•	Marital status
•	Origin including geographical origin
•	Disability
•	Sex
The Act also covers victimization and offensive behaviour.
The EOC has called for the Act to be amended to include:
•	AGE as a status of discrimination
•	SEXUAL ORIENTATION as a status of discrimination
•	The expansion of the definition of DISABILITY
•	The inclusion of HIV/AIDS, Cancer, and Multiple Sclerosis as disabilities
•	The inclusion of CO-HABITATIONAL RELATIONSHIPS on the grounds of marital status
•	The inclusion of HALF-BLOOD RELATIONSHIPS in the definition of family

Name: Adviesbureau Verhoeven
Description:
Hoe kunnen wij u helpen gelukkig te wonen met de juiste zorg? 


Adviesbureau Verhoeven is gespecialiseerd in het aanpakken van problematiek bij correspondentie met overheidsinstanties zoals de gemeenten.
Een veel voorkomend probleem is de huisvesting van ouderen met eventueel behoefte aan aangepast wonen. Bent u op zoek naar een geschikte woonsituatie in uw bestaande (huur)woning, boot of op uw perceel die past bij uw levensfase dan kan Adviesbureau Verhoeven u hierin onder andere begeleiden bij het aanvragen van vergunningen en subsidies conform woonwens bij de desbetreffende gemeente. Ook kunt u bij Adviesbureau Verhoeven terecht voor bemiddeling om in aanmerking voor een zorgcomplex te komen.
 
Tevens hebben wij ons de laatste jaren op de huizenmarkt georiënteerd en kunnen tal van oplossingen aandragen om (lang) te koop staande huizen door middel van een nieuw ontwikkeld concept toch conform marktprijs te kunnen verkopen. Wij hebben de laatste jaren een professioneel netwerk opgebouwd in de bouw en in de financiële sector.


Geen risico
Adviesbureau Verhoeven werkt volgens de `no cure, no pay´ methode. Het kan zo zijn dat blijkt dat uw wensen, nadat dat deze zijn bestudeerd en voorgelegd bij de betreffende instanties, niet realiseerbaar zijn.

Het advies van Adviesbureau Verhoeven kan dan zijn om van uw oorspronkelijke plan af te zien. Adviesbureau Verhoeven brengt u hiervoor geen kosten in rekening.
Wilt u meer weten dan komen we graag bij u langs voor een persoonlijke kennismaking of u kunt zich aanmelden voor een informatiebijeenkomst. Tijdens de informatiebijeenkomsten worden gerelateerde zaken zoals woonaanpassingen en (mantel)zorgwoningen besproken.

Developed at the Reese News Lab in the UNC School of Journalism and Mass Communication

Capitol Hound is a searchable audio archive and alert system for N.C. General Assembly floor sessions and committee meetings. Using transcription services, Capitol Hound makes hours of audio from the General Assembly searchable by quote, allowing users to search for any phrase that may have been spoken in an N.C. General Assembly session. Capitol Hound can also send alerts when audio containing keywords you care about are found, with links to the exact moment the keyword is mentioned on the floor.

Lobbyists, lawyers, and journalists can use Capitol Hound to stay up-to-date with the General Assembly and to navigate hours of session audio quickly.

Name: Office of State Representative Sharon Chung
Description:
State Representative Sharon Chung is a mother, dedicated teacher and musician, and lifelong Illinoisan. As a professional violist and violinist, Sharon is an active member of the American Federation of Musicians Local 301 and performs on stages across Central Illinois. 
 
The daughter of Korean immigrants, Sharon moved to Bloomington to attend college at Illinois Wesleyan University before attending graduate school at Northwestern University. She was drawn back to the community when starting her family and has called Bloomington home since 2009, where she lives with her two daughters. 
 
In 2018, Sharon became the first Asian-American to be elected in the history of McLean County when she won a seat on the County Board where she pushed for increased transparency. Elected as state representative in 2022, Sharon has been fighting for working families and is a tireless advocate for the residents of the 91st District.

The 91st District includes portions of McLean, Peoria, Tazewell, and Woodford Counties

Check4Balance
Description:
Leent u veel flexkrachten in, bij verschillende bedrijven en op verschillende momenten? Beschikt u al over alle vereiste documenten van uw (inter)nationale flexkrachten? En voldoen al uw leveranciers nog aan alle eisen? Met documentbeheer van Check4Balance houden wij de administratie van uw flexkrachten voor u op orde. En u houdt het overzicht. Zo minimaliseert u risico’s op inlenersaansprakelijkheid of boetes.

Met een doordachte tool verzorgen wij uw documentbeheer van A tot Z. We houden bij via welke bedrijven u flexkrachten inhuurt en monitoren of dit bedrijf aan alle gestelde eisen voldoet. Is de uitlenende organisatie bijvoorbeeld Waadi-geregistreerd en ingeschreven bij de Kamer van Koophandel, beschikt het bedrijf over een VCU-certificering, wat zijn de NAW-gegevens, hebben zij een schone verklaring inzake betalingsgedrag van de Belastingdienst en betaalt men conform de geldende CAO? Wij controleren al deze informatie en brengen dit voor u in kaart. Zo minimaliseert u de risico’s. Want als uw flexwerkers bijvoorbeeld onvoorzien geen of te weinig salaris ontvangen, bent u hiervoor ook als inlener aansprakelijk. Daarnaast vragen wij van al uw flexkrachten de vereiste documenten en gegevens op, zoals NAW-gegevens, BSN, urenstaat en dergelijke. Behalve uw leverancier, bent u ook zelf verantwoordelijk voor een goede administratie. De Belastingdienst kan ook aan u als inlener boetes opleggen.  Check4Balance zorgt ervoor dat u over de voorgeschreven documenten van ingeleende flexkrachten beschikt, waardoor dit risico voor uw organisatie minimaal is.

Via onze periodieke overzichten krijgt u inzicht in uw leveranciers en ziet u welke documenten nog ontbreken. Uiteraard hebben wij daar dan al regelmatig om gevraagd. Als uw leveranciers desondanks in gebreke blijven, kunt u op basis van onze overzichten eventueel andere keuzes maken en vervolgacties inzetten.
